summary: Verified bug fixes: Analytics page crash resolved (useTranslation added to RatingsBarChart), Course Management removed from Pro system, VIP Hub Mentors tab removed. All features working correctly.

issues: Title shows 'vip.hub.title' translation key instead of actual text - minor translation key issue

critical_code_review_comments: analytics.tsx: useTranslation() hook correctly added to RatingsBarChart component (line 161)
dashboard.tsx: Course-related code removed, Quick Actions now link to /pro/catalog
hub.tsx: 'pros' removed from FeatureType union, FEATURES_CONFIG no longer includes 'pros' entry
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) Analytics page no longer crashes - RatingsBarChart component now properly imports and uses useTranslation hook. 2) Course Management completely removed from Pro dashboard - no courses links exist, catalog link replaces it. 3) VIP Hub 'Mentors' tab removed - only 8 tabs remain: tools, alerts, wallet, academy, marketplace, social, achievements, ai.

tests_performed.details: Dashboard loads at /pro/dashboard with tabs: Vue générale, Mon Catalogue, Réservations, Avis, Revenus - NO 'Cours' tab

Analytics page at /pro/analytics loads without crash. Shows: revenue total, period buttons (7J/30J/3M/1A), charts for revenue evolution, revenue breakdown, performance indicators, ratings distribution. RatingsBarChart component renders correctly with translations.
Catalog page at /pro/catalog works - shows 'Mon Catalogue' with 'Mes Contenus' and 'Mes Offres' tabs
VIP Hub at /vip/hub shows only 8 tabs: Outils, Alertes, Portfolio, Académie, Social, Récompenses, IA Mentor, Catalogue - NO 'Mentors' or 'Pros' tab
No /pro/courses links found in dashboard HTML. Catalog link replaces courses functionality.
